name: OpenClaw Voice Assistant
description: Speech-to-Speech voice interface — talk to your agent with Whisper STT + streaming TTS

port.description: Port for the voice assistant server (default: 7860)

host.description: Host to bind (default: 0.0.0.0 for remote access, 127.0.0.1 for local only)

whisperModel.description: Whisper model size (tiny = fast, small = accurate)

tunnel.description: HTTPS tunnel via Cloudflare (auto when host is not localhost, set false to disable)
